comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 7 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 7 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.title: www.wunderground.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: Stale
labels.description: The issue was not processed on time and was bumped to the top of the list

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[https://www.wunderground.com/dashboard/pws/IKROUN1](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.wunderground.com%2Fdashboard%2Fpws%2FIKROUN1)

### Comment
> Hello,
> 
> I would like to report a possible false positive or filtering issue with AdGuard DNS (dns.adguard-dns.com).
> 
> When AdGuard DNS is enabled on Android devices, Personal Weather Station (PWS) pages on Weather Underground do not load correctly.
> 
> What I tested:
> 
> Android phones with AdGuard DNS configured as Private DNS (dns.adguard-dns.com)
> Multiple browsers (Chrome and Opera)
> Multiple devices (the issue occurs on more than one Android phone)
> Clearing browser cache and site data did not resolve the issue
> 
> Observed behavior:
> 
> With AdGuard DNS enabled, station pages may either:
> display the station as Offline with no weather data shown, or
> redirect to a 404 Not Found page.
> 
> With AdGuard DNS disabled, the same station pages load correctly and weather data is displayed.
> With AdGuard DNS enabled but traffic routed through a VPN, the same station pages also load correctly.
> 
> The issue appears consistently on multiple devices using AdGuard DNS and disappears immediately when AdGuard DNS is disabled or bypassed through a VPN.
> 
> This suggests that a domain required by Weather Underground may be blocked or filtered by AdGuard DNS.
> 
> Thank you for investigating.



### Screenshots
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/d904cbqzqc084oc088sg8kok4cco8w0ivt2646w9kg.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/8aan3xf8e6ck8oc8o8ssoc8s0oo0cgooiqtwpclkfk.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

### System configuration

| Information | Value |
|-------------|-------|
AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS
DNS setup: | Router
DNS server: | Default
System version: | `Android 16`
Browser: | Opera

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 7 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.title: www.windowscentral.com

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.title: False positive request: applovin.com B2B subdomains in Mobile Ads (filter 11) and DNS (filter 15)

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

labels.name: A: Waiting for data
labels.description: Waiting for more information from the user

issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard DNS

### AdGuard version

AdGuard DNS - public resolver (no client version applicable)

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Website or app doesn't work properly

### Which browser(s) do you use?

the problem is with app, not a site

### Which device do you use?

Desktop

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://ads.applovin.com/

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

### Privacy

_No response_

### Social Widgets

_No response_

### Annoyances

_No response_

### Security

_No response_

### Other

_No response_

### DNS filters

AdGuard DNS filter

### Language-specific

_No response_

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

1. Writing as the domain owner. The `||applovin.com^` entry in AdGuard Mobile Ads filter (filter 11) and AdGuard DNS filter (filter 15) is a wildcard that blocks every applovin.com subdomain. Seven of those are public-facing B2B surfaces, not consumer ad-serving endpoints:

- applovin.com and www.applovin.com: corporate marketing site
- ads.applovin.com: Ads Manager web UI, used by advertisers to manage their own campaigns
- max.applovin.com: MAX management UI for publishers
- dash.applovin.com: AppLovin dashboard
- api.ads.applovin.com: API backend for the Ads Manager UI
- support.applovin.com: support documentation

The "ads" prefix on the manager UI is the heuristic trigger, but the endpoint is a B2B management tool.

Would you consider removing the `||applovin.com^` entry from those filters? Happy to provide additional context if useful.

Contact:
Erol Keskiner
Operations, AppLovin
devops@applovin.com


### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

Would you consider removing the `||applovin.com^` entry from those filters? Happy to provide additional context if useful.

Contact:
Erol Keskiner
Operations, AppLovin
devops@applovin.com


### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=fl1RNnvvV2o&pp=ugUEEgJlbg%3D%3D&ra=m](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fm.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3Dfl1RNnvvV2o%26pp%3DugUEEgJlbg%253D%253D%26ra%3Dm) ### Comment > Youtube on safari seems to be disabling the extensions itself. > > And still getting a black void that persists the length of an advertisement ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/37h4iuxc2jc4w0c80s8kcc40s4k8cgweujrlnkw8xk.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for iOS v4.5.20 License type: | free Advanced protection: | disabled Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter,
AdGuard Mobile Ads filter,
EasyList

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter,
EasyPrivacy,
Peter Lowe's Blocklist

**Annoyances:**
AdGuard Annoyances filter,
AdGuard Cookie Notices filter,
AdGuard Popups filter,
AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter,
AdGuard Other Annoyances filter,
AdGuard Widgets filter,
Adblock Warning Removal List,

**Other:**

AdGuard DNS filter,
